languages.text: The user suffers a penalty to Weapon Skill equal to 5% of its maximum and a penalty to Ballistic Skill equal to 5% of its maximum.

traits.locale_text: The user suffers a penalty to Weapon Skill equal to 5% of its maximum and a penalty to Ballistic Skill equal to 5% of its maximum.

languages.text: The user's Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill are reduced by −5%.
languages.original_text: The user suffers a penalty to Weapon Skill equal to 5% of its maximum and a penalty to Ballistic Skill equal to 5% of its maximum.

traits.locale_text:
Whenever the user uses a stimulator or a medikit, they must pass a Toughness resistance test with a −{uip|DC|13cae3669ca8470dbce63f0ec288bb24} penalty or suffer 1 stack of perplexed for 2 rounds.
As long as the user has {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g}, they cannot use drugs and medikits and must pass this Toughness test at the start of each turn.

Whenever the user uses a stimulator or a medikit, they must pass a Toughness resistance test with a −{uip|DC|13cae3669ca8470dbce63f0ec288bb24} penalty or suffer 1 stack of perplexed for 2 rounds.
As long as the user has {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g}, they cannot use drugs and medikits and must pass this Toughness test at the start of each turn.
The user's Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill are reduced by −5%.
The user's Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill are reduced by −5%.

Whenever the user uses a stimulator or a medikit, they must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|13cae3669ca8470dbce63f0ec288bb24} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} or suffer +1 stack of {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}perplexed{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
As long as the user has a {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}crippled left arm{/g}, they cannot use drugs and medikits and must pass this Toughness {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} at the start of each {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

languages.text: Ближний бой и Дальний бой обладателя аугмента уменьшены на 5%.
languages.original_text: The user's Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill are reduced by −5%.

traits.locale_text:
Когда обладатель аугмента использует стимулятор или медкомплект, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}штрафом{/g} −{uip|DC|13cae3669ca8470dbce63f0ec288bb24} и в случае провала получает 1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательства{/g} на 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Если у обладателя аугмента {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}покалечена левая рука{/g}, он не может использовать стимуляторы и медкомплекты, а также должен проходить эту {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверку{/g} на Выносливость в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.

Когда обладатель аугмента использует стимулятор или медкомплект, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}штрафом{/g} −{uip|DC|13cae3669ca8470dbce63f0ec288bb24} и в случае провала получает 1 уровень {g|Encyclopedia:PerplexedEffect}замешательства{/g} на 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Если у обладателя аугмента {g|f:e026d82067804bca899de79f0650c6b6}покалечена левая рука{/g}, он не может использовать стимуляторы и медкомплекты, а также должен проходить эту {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверку{/g} на Выносливость в начале каждого {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}.

languages.text: La Habilidad de armas y la Habilidad de proyectiles del usuario se reducen un −5 %.
languages.original_text: The user's Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill are reduced by −5%.

traits.locale_text: La Habilidad de armas y la Habilidad de proyectiles del usuario se reducen un −5 %.

languages.text: La Capacité de combat et la Capacité de tir de l'utilisateur sont réduites de −5 %.

traits.locale_text: 使用者的武器技能和弹道技能降低5%。
